Class Budget

java.lang.Object
model.Budget
public class Budget extends Object
This class represents a budget for a specific category. It tracks the spending limit, current expenses, and budget status.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Budget(String category, double limitAmount)
    Constructs a Budget with zero initial spending.
    Budget(String category, double limitAmount, double spent)
    Constructs a Budget with a category, limit amount, and initial spent value.

    Adds an expense to the budget.

    Returns the budget category.

    Returns the spending limit
    double

    Calculates the remaining budget.
    double

    Returns the amount spent so far

    Returns the current status of the budget.
    String

    Converts the budget object to a string format for file storage.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Budget

      public Budget(String category, double limitAmount, double spent)
      Constructs a Budget with a category, limit amount, and initial spent value.
      Parameters:
      category - the budget category
      limitAmount - the maximum allowed spending
      spent - the initial amount already spent

    • Budget

      public Budget(String category, double limitAmount)
      Constructs a Budget with zero initial spending.
      Parameters:
      category - the budget category
      limitAmount - the maximum allowed spending

  • Method Details

    • getCategory

      public String getCategory()
      Returns the budget category.
      Returns:
      category name

    • getLimitAmount

      public double getLimitAmount()
      Returns the spending limit
      Returns:
      limit amount

    • getSpent

      public double getSpent()
      Returns the amount spent so far
      Returns:
      spent amount

    • getRemaining

      public double getRemaining()
      Calculates the remaining budget.
      Returns:
      remaining amount (limit - spent)

    • addExpense

      public void addExpense(double amount)
      Adds an expense to the budget.
      Parameters:
      amount - the expense amount to add

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Returns the current status of the budget.
      Returns:
      "Exceeded" if over limit, "Near Limit" if 75% or more used, otherwise "On Track"

    • toFileLine

      public String toFileLine()
      Converts the budget object to a string format for file storage.
      Returns:
      comma-separated string (category, limitAmount, spent)

    • fromFileLine

      public static Budget fromFileLine(String line)
      Creates a Budget object from a file line.
      Parameters:
      line - a comma-separated string representing a budget
      Returns:
      Budget object created from the line
